invalid_credentials: Unknown email address or incorrect password.
email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address via the email you received.
user_already_registered: This email address is already registered.
quota_exceeded: Device storage is full. Delete old catches or free up space on your device.
sync_partial_failure: Sync partially failed. Will retry automatically.
record_save_failed: Could not save change. Please try again.
register_success: Account created. Check your email to confirm, then log in.
export_no_euring: Export blocked: no EURING code for {{count}} record(s) — species: {{names}}. Correct the species name to match a known species.
export_no_date: Export blocked: {{count}} record(s) without catch date. Correct these catches before exporting.
export_short_ring: Export blocked: {{count}} record(s) with empty or too short ring number (minimum 4 characters). Correct these catches before exporting.
export_no_aupi: ActingUserProjectID (AUPI) missing for: {{projects}}. Go to Projects → open the project → click on "Members" → enter your AUPI number next to your name. Find this number in GRIEL via: My administration → My projects → click the + next to the project.
import_missing_fields: {{count}} record(s) missing required fields (species name, ring number, catch date).
admin_load_error: Could not load users. First run supabase-phase3.sql in the Supabase SQL editor.
project_number_exists: Project number {{number}} already exists (including inactive projects).
project_user_not_found: No account found for this email address.
project_already_member: This user is already a member of the project.
